name: Mine
hints: Deeper in the mine. An unlit candle is here.
GET CAND - light it with matches to see in dark areas.
LIGH CAND with matches to use as a light source.
GET CAND. S=deepest mine (23). U=mine with bullet (21).
notes: Mine with unlit candle (light source). S=deepest mine (23), U=mine (21).
